name: Evolution Tale
developer: X Woomy Games, Abel Reyes, Isaac Ramírez
short_description: Chop down trees, mine rocks and pick up plants to combine them and craft a total of 500 different items that can be used to evolve and develop new technologies until you reach the modern ages.
detailed_description:
Collect materials and advance through different stages of history to get to the modern ages.

Explore 8 wonderful worlds full of life where you can collect plants, cut trees or mine precious stones to craft new tools and discover new items.
You'll find a variety of almost 500 items which you can then use to craft new combinations and evolve through the ages.
about_the_game:
